error_pattern: Uniform 3/20 pass per site — identical pattern across all brands/regions
notes: Perfectly uniform failure rate (15%) across all 8 sites. The 3 passing tests per site are likely the basic structural ones (CART-001 loads, CART-004 region content, CART-005 HTTPS). The 17 failing tests all require a product to be in cart first. Root cause: add-to-cart prerequisite is broken (confirmed by add-to-cart spec). Fix add-to-cart → expect significant cart pass rate improvement.
